description: Observability budget dashboard. This view verifies diagnostics stay cheaper than runtime and shows DB write pressure caused by the exporter itself.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), CONCAT_WS(' / ', metric_name, NULLIF(storage_target, '')) AS metric, max(p95_value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND metric_name IN ('observability_export_db_ms','db_write_ms','db_write_round_trip_ms','db_write_payload_build_ms','persistence_wait_ms') AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), CONCAT_WS(' / ', metric_name, NULLIF(storage_target, '')) AS metric, sum(value_sum)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND metric_name IN ('observability_raw_samples_seen','observability_rollup_rows_written','observability_export_errors','db_write_rows_total','db_write_attempted_rows_total') AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(bucket_start, $__interval), COALESCE(NULLIF(storage_target, ''), 'metric_rollups') AS metric, max(latest_value)::double precision AS value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND metric_name='observability_rollup_reduction_ratio' AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT bucket_start AS time, component, metric_name, storage_target, pipeline_stage, message_kind, bot_id, run_id, ROUND(p95_value::numeric, 2)::double precision AS p95, ROUND(p99_value::numeric, 2)::double precision AS p99, ROUND(value_max::numeric, 2)::double precision AS max, sample_count FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(bucket_start) AND metric_name IN ('observability_export_db_ms','db_write_ms','db_write_round_trip_ms','db_write_payload_build_ms','persistence_wait_ms') AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY value_max DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT observed_at AS time, level, event_name, component, bot_id, run_id, storage_target, failure_mode, message, details FROM observability_events.botlens_backend_events_v1 WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at) AND event_name IN ('observability_export_queue_overflow','db_write_slow','botlens_observability_metric_export_failed','botlens_observability_event_export_failed') AND COALESCE(bot_id, '') ~ '${bot_id:regex}' AND COALESCE(run_id, '') ~ '${run_id:regex}' ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 100;

list.definition: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __text, bot_id AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;
list.label: bot_id
list.name: bot_id
list.query: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __text, bot_id AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE run_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 200;
list.label: run_id
list.name: run_id
list.query: SELECT '.*' AS __text, '.*' AS __value UNION SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM observability_metrics.botlens_backend_metric_rollups_v1 WHERE run_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 200;

title: Observability Cost Control
